text.title: API Contract-First Development Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure from raw input to validated api-contract-first artefact.

step.name: draft-spec
step.action: Fill paths, components.schemas, examples for each operation.

step.name: wire-codegen
step.action: Configure codegen (openapi-generator / orval / oapi-codegen) per language; commit generated artefacts under generated/.

step.name: wire-ci-diff
step.action: Add CI job: run oasdiff vs main; fail on breaking changes without x-breaking-change annotation.

step.name: verify-and-publish
step.action: Run examples coverage check (every op has >= 1 example); run codegen end-to-end; ship pack.
